name: @firstpick/pi-skill-deployment-automation
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for Docker Compose deployments, container updates, stack health checks, rollbacks, compose-file changes, image upgrades, failed deploys, or service restart planning. Provides safe deployment and rollback workflows.
description_zh: 代理应在 Docker Compose 部署、容器更新、堆栈健康检查、回滚、compose-file 更改、镜像升级、部署失败或服务重启规划时调用此技能。提供安全的部署和回滚工作流。
